Parameters.Name: ConnectionString
Parameters.Label: Connection string

Parameters.Name: SqlScriptFile
Parameters.Label: SQL Script File
Parameters.HelpText: Script file to run. Can be bound to a variable. Text output by the PRINT statement in SQL will be logged to the deployment log. Use 'GO' to separate multiple commands.

Parameters.Name: ContinueOnError
Parameters.Label: Continue On Error
Parameters.HelpText: If set to true, an error with the SQL statement will simply write to the log and not cause an error in the deployment.

Parameters.Name: CommandTimeout
Parameters.Label: Command Timeout
Parameters.HelpText: The SQL Command Timeout. By default is 30 seconds.
